intent: Follow up after a client meeting
key_facts: Discussed the Q3 product roadmap
Client requested a revised timeline by next Wednesday
Next sync scheduled for Friday at 10 AM
reference_email:
Subject: Follow-Up: Q3 Roadmap Discussion and Next Steps

Dear Ms. Carter,

Thank you for the productive conversation regarding our Q3 product roadmap. As discussed, we will prepare a revised timeline and share it with you by next Wednesday.

To maintain momentum, I have confirmed our next sync for Friday at 10 AM. Please let me know if that time remains convenient.

Best regards,
Daniel

intent: Send a vendor the full requirements for an enterprise proposal
key_facts: Need detailed pricing for the enterprise plan
Require 24/7 support with a 1-hour response SLA
Must support single sign-on via SAML
Need data residency in the EU
Proposal due before August 1
Project kicks off in Q4 with about 500 seats
reference_email:
Subject: Enterprise Proposal Requirements

Dear Vendor Team,

We are preparing to launch a 500-seat deployment in Q4 and would like a proposal for your enterprise plan. Please include detailed pricing for that tier.

Our requirements are: 24/7 support with a one-hour response SLA, single sign-on via SAML, and data residency within the EU. To keep our timeline, we would need the completed proposal before August 1.

Thank you for your attention to these details.

Kind regards,
Procurement

key_facts: Order #4821 is delayed by five business days
A 15 percent discount is offered on the next order
New delivery date is June 30
reference_email:
Subject: Update and Apology Regarding Order #4821

Dear Valued Customer,

I am truly sorry for the delay with order #4821. Due to an unexpected logistics issue, your delivery will arrive five business days later than promised, with a new date of June 30.

We know this is frustrating, and to make it right we would like to offer you a 15 percent discount on your next order. Thank you for your patience and understanding.

Warm regards,
Customer Care

intent: Tell customers about a price increase while keeping them reassured and loyal
key_facts: Monthly price rises from 20 to 26 dollars on September 1
Existing customers keep the old price for three more months
Two new features are included: priority support and unlimited exports
Customers can cancel anytime with no fee
reference_email:
Subject: An Update to Your Plan (and What's New)

Hi there,

We want to keep you informed about a change to your plan. Starting September 1, the monthly price will move from $20 to $26. As a thank-you for being with us, you'll keep your current rate for three more months before the new price applies.

The update also brings real value: your plan now includes priority support and unlimited exports. And as always, you can cancel anytime with no fee.

Thank you for your continued trust.

Warm regards,
The Team

intent: Notify the team of an urgent production outage
key_facts: Checkout service is down as of 2:15 PM
All engineers should join the incident bridge immediately
Status updates will post every 30 minutes
reference_email:
Subject: URGENT: Checkout Service Outage - All Engineers Needed

Team,

The checkout service went down at 2:15 PM and is currently impacting customers. All engineers must join the incident bridge immediately.

We will post status updates every 30 minutes until the service is restored. Please drop non-critical work and prioritize this now.

Thanks,
Incident Lead

intent: Thank a mentor for their guidance
key_facts: Their advice helped me earn a promotion
Especially grateful for the interview coaching
Would like to stay in touch
reference_email:
Subject: Thank You for Your Guidance

Dear Professor Lin,

I wanted to share some good news and say thank you. With your guidance, I recently earned a promotion, and I am especially grateful for the interview coaching you gave me along the way.

Your mentorship has meant a great deal to me, and I would love to stay in touch.

With gratitude,
Maria

key_facts: The proposal does not fit our current roadmap
We may revisit in early next year
We appreciate the time they invested
reference_email:
Subject: Regarding Your Partnership Proposal

Dear Mr. Okafor,

Thank you for the detailed partnership proposal and the time your team invested in it. After careful review, we have concluded that it does not align with our current roadmap.

That said, our priorities may shift, and we would welcome the opportunity to revisit this conversation early next year. We appreciate your understanding.

Sincerely,
Business Development

intent: Invite clients to a product webinar with the exact logistics
key_facts: Webinar is on October 14 from 3:00 to 4:30 PM Eastern Time
Topic is the 2026 analytics roadmap
Seats are limited to the first 200 registrants
A recording will be sent to everyone who registers
Registration link will follow in a separate email
reference_email:
Subject: Invitation: 2026 Analytics Roadmap Webinar

Dear Client,

We would like to invite you to our upcoming webinar on the 2026 analytics roadmap, taking place on October 14 from 3:00 to 4:30 PM Eastern Time.

Seats are limited to the first 200 registrants, so we encourage you to reserve early. If you are unable to attend live, a recording will be sent to everyone who registers. The registration link will follow in a separate email.

We hope to see you there.

Best regards,
The Events Team

intent: Request a deadline extension from a manager
key_facts: Need three extra days on the analytics report
A data source was delayed on our end
Can deliver by Monday instead of Thursday
reference_email:
Subject: Request for a Short Extension on the Analytics Report

Hi Priya,

I wanted to flag that one of our data sources arrived later than expected, which has affected the analytics report timeline. Could I have three additional days to ensure the analysis is accurate?

That would move delivery from Thursday to Monday. Please let me know if that works, and I'm happy to share a draft sooner if helpful.

Thank you,
Nate

intent: Announce a new feature to existing users
key_facts: Dark mode is now available on web and mobile
It can be enabled in display settings
Feedback can be sent through the in-app form
reference_email:
Subject: Dark Mode Is Here!

Hi there,

We're excited to announce that dark mode is now live on both web and mobile! Whether you're working late or just prefer a darker look, we've got you covered.

To turn it on, head to your display settings and pick the dark theme. We'd love to hear what you think, so share your thoughts anytime through the in-app feedback form.

Happy browsing,
The Product Team
